Serialized Form

  • Package algatorgraph

    • Class algatorgraph.DEdge extends java.lang.Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • source

          V source
          Source vertex of the edge

        • target

          V target
          Target vertex of the edge

        • weight

          W weight
          Weight of the edge

    • Class algatorgraph.DGraph extends java.lang.Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • adjacencyLists

          java.util.Map<V,​java.util.Set<DEdge<V,​W>>> adjacencyLists
          Adjacency lists mapping each vertex to its outgoing edges

    • Class algatorgraph.Edge extends java.lang.Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • vertex1

          V vertex1
          Vertex1 of the undirected edge

        • vertex2

          V vertex2
          Vertex2 of the undirected edge

        • weight

          W weight
          Weight of the undirected edge

    • Class algatorgraph.Graph extends java.lang.Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • adjacencyLists

          java.util.Map<V,​java.util.HashSet<Edge<V,​W>>> adjacencyLists
          Adjacency lists mapping each vertex to its incident edges
